{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Blackflame power
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame power]] consists of black destruction and red heat.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame power]] flared against acid-green light.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
